title: fix dim error in rope
body: Fix a RuntimeError in RoPE when the embedding dimension d is odd. The current RoPE cache construction creates cos/sin caches with length 2 * floor(d/2), which equals d-1 for odd d, causing a dimension mismatch with the input that has last-dimension size d. The patch pads the cache to length d so that the rotation can be applied consistently (rotating the first 2*floor(d/2) features and leaving any remaining feature(s) unaffected).

step_plan.summary: Fix a dimension mismatch in RoPE for odd embedding dimensions by padding the cos/sin caches to match the embedding dimension d and applying rotation to the appropriate subset, ensuring consistent broadcasting for both even and odd dimensions.

steps.operation: Patch RotaryPositionalEmbeddings._build_cache to pad cos/sin caches to length d when d is odd
steps.reason: Current cache length is 2 * floor(d/2) which equals d-1 for odd d, causing a dimension mismatch with input x of shape [..., d]. Pad to length d and rotate only the first 2*floor(d/2) features, leaving the remaining features unrotated.
steps.side_effects: Ensures compatibility for odd d; preserves behavior for even d; adds regression test for odd d (e.g., d=3); may require minor updates to downstream code that relies on exact cache length, but broadcasting remains compatible; unit tests should verify shapes and outputs
